codeQuality.comments: Clean separation between usecase and command layer. Strong TypeScript typing. Comprehensive test coverage with 15 unit tests and 7 CLI integration tests.

VAL-M2-CREATE-001.notes: maestro mission create creates mission with required fields (name, objective) and generates unique ID in YYYY-MM-DD-random6 format

VAL-M2-CREATE-002.notes: Mission with all metadata stores all optional fields: description, priority (low/medium/high/critical), deadline

VAL-M2-CREATE-003.notes: Mission ID output returns generated ID in human-readable format and structured JSON

VAL-M2-CREATE-004.notes: --json output returns full mission object with wasCreated: true flag

VAL-M2-CREATE-005.notes: Duplicate name detection works case-insensitively. CLI rejects without --force, allows with --force flag.
